name: Maya

profile.shopping_behaviour: Filters Vinted by fabric and manufacturing quality over brands. Mixes COS basics with secondhand European finds.
profile.personality: Resents mid-tier brands charging premium prices for low-quality fabrics. Excited by well-made pieces under £3. Obsessively tracks wardrobe purchases.
profile.style_identity: Seeks clean lines and natural fabrics via vintage hunting. Invests in quality leather footwear over trends. Pursues quiet luxury affordably.

preview_description: Maya haunts Vinted using searches like 'made in France 100% linen' to find overlooked vintage gems while everyone else chases Zara. She'll save for Repetto flats but thrifts her blazers. Sustainability matters, but so does her overdraft—she's mastered the art of looking expensive on a creative's salary.

preview_attributes.key_brands: COS, Weekday, Vinted, Massimo Dutti (vintage), Repetto, & Other Stories
preview_attributes.style_identity: Aspiring quiet luxury via secondhand quality pieces
preview_attributes.shopping_triggers: Finding undervalued vintage pieces with good fabric and construction; TikTok and Pinterest inspiration boards
preview_attributes.pain_points: Mid-range brands like Aritzia feeling identical to Shein quality; gaping at bust; having taste that exceeds budget
